name: jlrdtc
description: Windows-first Land Rover diagnostic desktop app using Electron, Rust J2534 service, and SQLite.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n desktop,j2534 -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/desktop" "npm run dev -w packages/j2534-service"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/diag-core && npm run build -w packages/data
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/diag-core && npm run typecheck -w packages/data && npm run typecheck -w apps/desktop
